svg.text: EMBEDDED TIER · ui://genie/grid · THREE DISPLAY MODES

g.text: Under the MCP-App CSP (default-src 'none'): system fonts only — web fonts are blocked. The surface defers to the host theme; ink-blue structure + crisp clay carry identity.
genie declares availableDisplayModes at ui/initialize; the host chooses the framing; genie calls ui/request-display-mode to switch.

svg.text: default · embedded in the host's content flow

g.text: Tweak it, or ask me to refine — I'll regenerate.

svg.text: view takes over the window — genie owns the grid
floating overlay · persists while you work

g.text: The card markup is byte-identical across inline / fullscreen / pip —
RFC G-5. Only the host's framing changes. genie must read right at all
three scales — a compact chat card, a full-window grid, a floating mini-
preview — on system fonts, deferring to the host theme, ink-blue + clay

svg.text: genie · embedded modes · three measured views of one iframe · surface 3 / 4
